params.name: Holy Grail
params.description:
On Apr 22, 563 AD, Galahad, the Knight of the Round Table, survived the test and retrieved the Holy Grail for King Arthur.
After the crucifixion of Jesus, Joseph of Arimathea buried him and brought the Holy Grail Jesus used at the Last Supper to Great Britain, where he had never been seen. A long time later, King Arthur and his Knights of the Round Table got some clues about the Holy Grail. All of the knights set out to find the Grail, but only Galahad brought it back. Because of that, Galaha …
